no: 3xClass HLAs should go before HLA mods, and requires TA's Remove experience cap (disabling the cap with EET Tweaks isn't recognized) DavidW: "Arguably [TA's triple HLAs] shouldn't prevent [ToF's HLAs], Cam and I may have been a bit overenthusiastic in the mutual compatibility code." SubtleD's Stat Overhauls - Experience components These are for starting a game with a given XP amount v Adjust SoD starting XP Jastey's SoD Tweaks already has the same thing

conflicts.myComps: #110 #122 WIS bonus spell table #151 #152 #153 Hit Dice Overhaul #160 Saving Throws #180 Dual-Class Reqs

conflicts.reason: CRITICAL overlap on stat modifier 2DAs if cn:100 used with 3E stats — both COPY strmod.2da/strmodex.2da/dexmod.2da, last installed wins completely. SubtleD cn:100 copies from its data/ directory; TB cn:4000/4500 recalculate using 3E formulas. SubtleD cn:100/110 ABSENT, cn:130 (2H Strength) present. TB cn:4000-6500 (all 3E stats) present. No conflict in current preset — cn:130 modifies item effects via opcode 44 (independent of stat tables), cn:160/180 don't touch stat 2DAs. TB cn:7000 (druids metal) modifies item class restrictions (orthogonal to everything). If ever adding SubtleD cn:100: CHOOSE SubtleD OR TB 3E stats, never both. Neither mod detects the other.
conflicts.myComps: #100 Ability Score #110 Bonus Spell Slots #130 2H Strength #200 XP Tables

conflicts.reason: Two overlaps resolved by removal. (1) SD cn:160 (Saving Throw Overhaul) and ToF cn:80000 (Ability Score Modifiers) both modify saveprs/saverog/savewar/savewiz.2da — last installed wins, ToF overwrites SD. (2) SD cn:180 (Lower Dual-Class Reqs) and ToF cn:40000 (Class/race restrictions) both modify abdcscrq/abdcdsrq.2da — ToF overwrites SD. Removed SD cn:160 and cn:180 . SD cn:100/110/121/122/200/251/252 were already absent. Remaining SD cn:130 (2H Strength, item effects) and cn:140/222 (unrelated to ToF).

Magic Resistance replaced with Spell Resistance system

ki.pattern: ERROR Installing \[Plinkification\]|cannot convert new_bonus to integer
ki.description: Plinkification fails on !SHAMAN2.ITM (from Will-o-Wisp/Shaman mod) with 'cannot convert new_bonus to integer'. The item has a non-standard structure that Plinkification's item patching doesn't expect.
ki.workaround: Skip this component. It is cosmetic-only and has been removed from the Ultimate preset.

sum: Modular collection of tweaks to ability scores and related game rules including saving throws, racial bonuses, experience points, and magic resistance.

co.no: Incompatible with ToF Revised Ability Score Modifiers and HouseTweaks CON changes

co.n: Stat-based Bonus Spells for 5E Casters: bonuses for memorization slots AND casting slots

co.no: Intended for SD 5E Spellcasting. Choose these OR the 5E bonus spells, don't mix
